posts.text: Millions of girls were aborted for being girls. Now parents often lean towards them  https://www.economist.com/leaders/2025/06/05/the-stunning-decline-of-the-preference-for-having-boys?taid=69f1d1fb120b720001bffcbe&utm_campaign=editorial-social&utm_content=discovery.content&utm_medium=social-media.content.np&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text:
If you look at this as a business, you’re gonna be disappointed. This is the greatest stock promotion of all time (made better bc you can’t even buy shares today)…

$1T in AI capex so far and revenue has ramped to maybe $3B a month?? A good portion of that is just round-tripping too. Net of electricity, there is almost zero margin and then there’s a depreciation line. It’s all a flaming klown kar. But revs grow fast and the memes do get better over time, so I guess we have to fixate forever on AI…

I still can’t get my mind around how silly this all is. But it probably continues until the IPO. Then we can all laugh at it burning down…
posts.author: hkuppy
